HCMC.stay_area: District 1 — Bui Vien / Ben Thanh area
HCMC.why: Walking distance to 80% of attractions. Bui Vien for nightlife, Ben Thanh for market. Grab to D5/D4 for food streets (10 min, ₹100-150).
HCMC.walk_radius: 1.5 km covers Opera House, Notre Dame, War Remnants, Ben Thanh Market

airport_to_hotel.note: SGN airport → D1. Fixed price Grab. Don't take airport taxis — they overcharge.

HCMC.get_around: Walk inside D1. Grab for anything > 2km. Bus #19 for Hop-On Hop-Off route. Motorbike taxi (Grab Bike) ₹50-100 per ride.

Phu Quoc.why: Walking to night market, restaurants, beach. Grand World 15 min Grab. VinWonders 20 min. Airport 15 min.
Phu Quoc.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers night market, beach, restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Phu Quoc airport (PQC) → Duong Dong. Use Grab. If no Grab, Mai Linh taxi only — agree price first.

Phu Quoc.get_around: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option). Grab for evening drinking. Hotel usually arranges tour pickups free.

Hanoi.stay_area: Old Quarter — near Hoan Kiem Lake
Hanoi.why: Walking to EVERYTHING. Train Street, Water Puppet, night market, pho spots, Bun Cha, cafes — all within 1 km. Airport is far (27km) so Grab needed.
Hanoi.walk_radius: 1 km covers Old Quarter, Hoan Kiem, Train Street, Water Puppet, 50+ restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Noi Bai (HAN) → Old Quarter. Grab fixed price. NO airport buses after 10 PM — book Grab in advance for late arrivals.

Hanoi.get_around: Walk everywhere in Old Quarter. Grab for Temple of Literature (10 min, ₹100). Cyclo = SCAM — never take. Hoan Kiem loop is walkable in 20 min.

Sapa.stay_area: Sapa town center — near Sapa Square / Stone Church
Sapa.why: Walking to all restaurants, cafes, Moana, Sapa Square. Cat Cat Village 2 km downhill walk. Fansipan cable car 3 km (hotel shuttle free).
Sapa.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers town center, cafes, restaurants, Sapa Square

bus_to_hotel.note: Sapa Express bus drops at Sapa center. Most hotels 5-min walk. Hotel can send someone to carry bags if you ask.

Sapa.get_around: Walk in town. Motorbike taxi (₹100-200) for Fansipan/Rong May. Hotel arranges Fansipan shuttle free. Cat Cat is a 25-min downhill walk (35 min back up — take motorbike ₹100).

Halong Bay.stay_area: Day trip from Hanoi — no overnight needed
Halong Bay.why: Bus picks up from Hanoi Old Quarter at 6:30 AM. Returns by 8 PM. No hotel needed.

bus_to_cruise.note: Book through cruise package — most include bus transfer. Pick up from Old Quarter hotels. Bring water + snacks.

Halong Bay.get_around: Everything is on the cruise. Bus picks up and drops at hotel.

detailed_plans.label: Night Arrival
detailed_plans.tip: Sunday = Bui Vien peak night! Streets pedestrian-only, neon everywhere

area_guide.stay_area: District 1 — Bui Vien / Ben Thanh area
area_guide.why: Walking distance to 80% of attractions. Bui Vien for nightlife, Ben Thanh for market. Grab to D5/D4 for food streets (10 min, ₹100-150).
area_guide.walk_radius: 1.5 km covers Opera House, Notre Dame, War Remnants, Ben Thanh Market

airport_to_hotel.note: SGN airport → D1. Fixed price Grab. Don't take airport taxis — they overcharge.

area_guide.get_around: Walk inside D1. Grab for anything > 2km. Bus #19 for Hop-On Hop-Off route. Motorbike taxi (Grab Bike) ₹50-100 per ride.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab from SGN airport to D1. Fixed price, book inside terminal. DON'T take street taxis — they overcharge 2-3x.
Walk — if staying in D1 near Bui Vien, it's a 5-min walk. Ask hotel for directions.

timeline.activity: Bui Vien Walking Street — Sunday peak!

venue.order: Banh Mi Huynh Hoa (₹105) — Bourdain approved. Saigon Special beer (₹53).
venue.highlight: Sunday = pedestrian-only street. Neon, live music, street food. Peak energy 9 PM-1 AM.
venue.tip: Keep phone in FRONT pocket. Don't flash cash. Beer is cheapest at street stalls (₹53) not bars (₹175).

detailed_plans.label: Full Day Explorer
detailed_plans.tip: Outdoor 7AM-2PM. Museum/cafe crawl after. Rain is predictable!

area_guide.stay_area: District 1 — Bui Vien / Ben Thanh area
area_guide.why: Walking distance to 80% of attractions. Bui Vien for nightlife, Ben Thanh for market. Grab to D5/D4 for food streets (10 min, ₹100-150).
area_guide.walk_radius: 1.5 km covers Opera House, Notre Dame, War Remnants, Ben Thanh Market

airport_to_hotel.note: SGN airport → D1. Fixed price Grab. Don't take airport taxis — they overcharge.

area_guide.get_around: Walk inside D1. Grab for anything > 2km. Bus #19 for Hop-On Hop-Off route. Motorbike taxi (Grab Bike) ₹50-100 per ride.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Walk — same District 1 area. Head south on Nguyen Binh Khiem → left on Le Thanh Ton.

venue.order: Pho Tai (rare beef) + Quay (fried dough sticks)
venue.highlight: Since 1940s, family recipe. Broth simmered 12+ hours. Go before 9 AM — sells out by 10.
venue.tip: Add lime + chili from the condiment tray. Don't add hoisin — purists say it ruins the broth.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab — D5 is across the river. Don't walk, it's 45 min through traffic.

venue.highlight: Full city loop 60 min. Double-decker bus, upper deck best for photos. Audio guide in English.
venue.tip: Sit on the RIGHT side of upper deck for better Opera House + Notre Dame views.

timeline.activity: Banh Canh Cua Ba Ba — MICHELIN 2026!

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab — Thu Duc is far east. Budget 30 min for rush hour traffic. ~₹300.

venue.order: Banh Canh Cua (crab udon soup) — large bowl
venue.highlight: MICHELIN Bib Gourmand 2026. Silky thick noodles in crab broth. SELLS OUT 1 PM!
venue.tip: Arrive by 11 AM. They close when soup runs out. Add chili + lime.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab — from Thu Duc back to D4. Cross-town ride, budget 35 min for evening traffic.

venue.highlight: 30+ immersive projection rooms. AC — great rain escape. 2 hrs minimum.
venue.tip: Start from top floor and work down. Last entry 5 PM. Thiso Mall has food court after.

timeline.activity: Vinh Khanh Food St — Seafood dinner

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab — short ride from D4 to D1. Walking is 25 min through narrow streets, not recommended at night.

venue.order: Grilled oysters (₹105/6), scallops with chili (₹175), sea snails
venue.highlight: Time Out UK top 31 food streets. Open-air seafood, locals' spot. Pick your seafood live.
venue.tip: Go to stall #12 or #15 — best reviews. Negotiate price BEFORE cooking. Bring wet wipes.

venue.order: Banh Mi Huynh Hoa (₹105) — Bourdain approved. Saigon Special beer (₹53).
venue.highlight: Sunday = pedestrian-only street. Neon, live music, street food. Peak energy 9 PM-1 AM.
venue.tip: Keep phone in FRONT pocket. Don't flash cash. Beer is cheapest at street stalls (₹53) not bars (₹175).

detailed_plans.label: Arrival + Grand World
detailed_plans.tip: Evening FREE shows at Grand World: Venice water show 9:30PM + Laser 10:45PM

area_guide.why: Walking to night market, restaurants, beach. Grand World 15 min Grab. VinWonders 20 min. Airport 15 min.
area_guide.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers night market, beach, restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Phu Quoc airport (PQC) → Duong Dong. Use Grab. If no Grab, Mai Linh taxi only — agree price first.

area_guide.get_around: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option). Grab for evening drinking. Hotel usually arranges tour pickups free.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

venue.highlight: Underground tunnel network from Vietnam War. 200km of tunnels. Firing range (real AK-47 ₹700/10 rounds).
venue.tip: Wear closed shoes — mud + insects. Skip if claustrophobic. Bring water — very humid.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Take Grab from Duong Dong to Grand World (north). 20 min ride. Or hotel shuttle if available (free).
Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

venue.highlight: FREE entry. Venice replica + Teddy Bear Museum (₹718). Evening shows: Venice water 9:30 PM, Laser 10:45 PM — both FREE.
venue.tip: Eat BEFORE coming — food inside is 2x price. Park near the lake for best show viewing.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

detailed_plans.label: 4 Island Tour
detailed_plans.tip: BOOK LOCAL ₹4,200 (NOT online ₹8,250!). July = low season, negotiate!

area_guide.why: Walking to night market, restaurants, beach. Grand World 15 min Grab. VinWonders 20 min. Airport 15 min.
area_guide.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers night market, beach, restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Phu Quoc airport (PQC) → Duong Dong. Use Grab. If no Grab, Mai Linh taxi only — agree price first.

area_guide.get_around: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option). Grab for evening drinking. Hotel usually arranges tour pickups free.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

venue.order: Bring motion sickness pills. Lunch included on boat — seafood + rice.
venue.highlight: World's longest oversea cable car (8km). Sea walking helmet (walk ocean floor). Snorkeling at 4 islands.
venue.tip: BOOK LOCAL at hotel reception (₹4,200) NOT online (₹8,250). Bring towel + sunscreen. Cables close in high wind.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.
Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.
Grab from Sunset Town (south) to Duong Dong (center). 20 min ride north.

venue.order: Kiss Bridge selfie at golden hour. Mediterranean gelato (₹150).
venue.highlight: Italian-style sunset town. Kiss Bridge, Clock Tower, Pompeii Ruins replica, Dragon Stairs. FREE.
venue.tip: Best at 5-6 PM golden hour. Walk the Dragon Stairs for panorama. Free — no entry fee anywhere.

venue.order: Sim wine (₹200-400), fresh seafood by weight, fish sauce souvenirs (₹300-600), grilled corn (₹50)
venue.highlight: 150+ stalls. Nightly 6 PM-midnight. Starfish, sea urchin, lobster. Best food market in Phu Quoc.
venue.tip: Ask TOTAL price not per-100g (scam trap). Try sim wine (rose myrtle). Negotiate 20% off. Cash only.

detailed_plans.label: VinWonders
detailed_plans.tip: Aquarium + indoor shows = rain-proof! THE ONCE SHOW 6:45PM — $12M production!

area_guide.why: Walking to night market, restaurants, beach. Grand World 15 min Grab. VinWonders 20 min. Airport 15 min.
area_guide.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers night market, beach, restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Phu Quoc airport (PQC) → Duong Dong. Use Grab. If no Grab, Mai Linh taxi only — agree price first.

area_guide.get_around: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option). Grab for evening drinking. Hotel usually arranges tour pickups free.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

venue.order: Deep Sea Restaurant (₹500-700) — aquarium view while eating. Combo meal deals at food court.
venue.highlight: Vietnam's largest theme park. Aquarium + water park + rides. THE ONCE show 6:45 PM ($12M production, fire+water+light).
venue.tip: Go counter-clockwise: rides → aquarium → water park → show. Book online for 10% off. Lockers ₹100.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.
Rent scooter ₹350/day (best option on island) or take Grab. Everything is 10-20 min from Duong Dong.

detailed_plans.label: Beach AM + Fly + Hanoi PM
detailed_plans.tip: Ong Lang hidden beach morning, then fly. Hanoi evening: Weekend Night Market!

area_guide.stay_area: Old Quarter — near Hoan Kiem Lake
area_guide.why: Walking to EVERYTHING. Train Street, Water Puppet, night market, pho spots, Bun Cha, cafes — all within 1 km. Airport is far (27km) so Grab needed.
area_guide.walk_radius: 1 km covers Old Quarter, Hoan Kiem, Train Street, Water Puppet, 50+ restaurants

airport_to_hotel.note: Noi Bai (HAN) → Old Quarter. Grab fixed price. NO airport buses after 10 PM — book Grab in advance for late arrivals.

area_guide.get_around: Walk everywhere in Old Quarter. Grab for Temple of Literature (10 min, ₹100). Cyclo = SCAM — never take. Hoan Kiem loop is walkable in 20 min.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Old Quarter is compact — walk if < 1km. Grab for Temple of Literature or airport. NEVER take cyclo — scam.

venue.order: Bring own snacks + water. No food stalls.
venue.highlight: Hidden cove beach. No crowds, crystal water. Best sunrise spot on island. FREE.
venue.tip: Go 6-8 AM for calm water. No facilities — bring everything. Reef shoes help (rocky entry).

transit_to_next.recommendation: Old Quarter is compact — walk if < 1km. Grab for Temple of Literature or airport. NEVER take cyclo — scam.

venue.order: Sea urchin (₹200, live from tank), crab hotpot (₹500), grilled scallops
venue.highlight: Authentic fishing village on stilts. Locals eat here, not tourists. Cheap fresh seafood.
venue.tip: Pick seafood from the tanks. Price by weight — check before cooking. 30 min from Duong Dong.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Old Quarter is compact — walk if < 1km. Grab for Temple of Literature or airport. NEVER take cyclo — scam.

detailed_plans.label: 🌧 Rain → Bike rent → Waterfalls + Pass
detailed_plans.tip: Rain rukte hi bike rent karo. Silver + Love Waterfall + O Quy Ho — SAB EK HI ROAD PE! Paragliding bhi yahin!

area_guide.stay_area: D Home Sapa 2 — 29 Violet Street, Sapa center
area_guide.why: Walking distance Stone Church, cafes, market. Bike se waterfalls 10 min.
area_guide.walk_radius: 0.5 km covers Stone Church, cafes, Sun Plaza, Ham Rong

bike_rent.where: Hotel se arrange kar lo ya Violet Street pe shops
bike_rent.need: License + passport deposit. Drive safe — mountain road!

area_guide.get_around: 🏍️ BIKE sabse best! Silver, Love, O Quy Ho sab same road pe — ek ride mein sab. Town mein walk.

timeline.activity: Rain rukne ka wait — Cafe crawl ☕

transit_to_next.recommendation: Cafe in the Clouds → Viettrekking (2 min walk). Dono try kar.

venue.order: Cafe in the Clouds = coconut coffee. Viettrekking = egg coffee + train view
venue.highlight: Foggy mountain vibe. Train passes every 30 min at Viettrekking.
venue.tip: Rain ruki nahi toh cafe mein hi baith. Fog + coffee = Sapa ka asli maza! ☕🌫️

timeline.activity: BIKE RIDE — Silver + Love Waterfall + O Quy Ho!

transit_to_next.recommendation: Silver → Love (2km) → O Quy Ho (8km) — sab QL4D road pe! Wapas aate waqt O Quy Ho se.

venue.order: ROUTE: Silver Waterfall (10 min stop) → Love Waterfall (15 min hike) → O Quy Ho Pass (cloud sea!) → Paragliding try karo 🪂
venue.highlight: 🌊 Silver = 200m waterfall. 💧 Love = bamboo trail hidden waterfall. 🏔️ O Quy Ho = Vietnam's highest mountain pass (2000m). SAB EK ROAD PE!
venue.tip: Silver se Love 2km. Love se O Quy Ho 8km. Wapas total 38km ride. Bike se 1.5hr ka trip. O Quy Ho pe paragliding operators hain — check karo weather!

transit_to_next.recommendation: Night market Stone Church ke paas.

venue.order: Coffee (₹300-500/kg), H'Mong scarf (₹200-400), embroidered bags (₹300-600)
venue.highlight: Night market + local shops. Best gifts for mom/dad/sister!
venue.tip: H'Mong women se negotiate karna — 50% of asking price se start.

venue.order: Grilled pork, sticky rice, local veggies
venue.highlight: BBQ street near Stone Church. Rain ke baad fresh air + grilled meat!
venue.tip: Purple sticky rice try karo.

detailed_plans.label: 🏍️ Muong Hoa Valley Drive + Cafe End
detailed_plans.tip: Bike ride Cat Cat → Lao Chai → Ta Van. Last stop = BEST CAFE!

area_guide.stay_area: D Home Sapa 2 — 29 Violet Street, Sapa center
area_guide.why: Sab walking distance. Bike ride ke liye best location.

timeline.activity: RIDE: Cat Cat Valley → Lao Chai Rice Terraces → Ta Van Village 🌾

transit_to_next.recommendation: Ta Van → wapas town. 20 min ride through rice terraces.

venue.order: STOPS: Cat Cat viewpoint photos 📸 → Lao Chai rice terraces 🌾 → Ta Van village walk 🏘️
venue.highlight: 12 km of pure mountain scenery! Rice terraces, local villages, foggy mountains. Bike ke liye best route of Sapa!
venue.tip: Ta Van mein rukna mat bhoolna — wahan se wapas aate waqt sunset light rice terraces pe!

timeline.activity: 🚶 BEST CAFE: Cafe in the Clouds ☁️ (rooftop view)

transit_to_next.recommendation: Ya The Hill Station bhi try kar sakta hai — 3 min walk.

venue.order: Try: Coconut coffee 🥥☕ ya Hot Chocolate
venue.highlight: Rooftop cafe! Puri valley + mountain view. Fog rolling in = cloud cafe experience!
venue.tip: Upper floor window seat lo. 5PM-6PM best light for photos. Bike ride ke baad yahan aake baithna = pure bliss!

timeline.activity: Last shopping — gifts for family (coffee, scarves, handicrafts)

detailed_plans.label: 🗻 FANSIPAN! → Night Bus Hanoi
detailed_plans.tip: TUESDAY = 10 MIN QUEUE!! Fansipan subah. Shaam ko night bus Hanoi. PERFECT DAY!

area_guide.why: Hotel se Fansipan 1.4km (2 min bike/shuttle). Night bus bhi town se.

bike_rent.where: Return bike in morning or keep till evening

area_guide.get_around: 🏍️ Bike ya hotel shuttle to Fansipan (1.4km). Walk for town.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Bike se 2 min ya hotel shuttle free. Wapas bhi same.

venue.order: Summit cafe: hot chocolate ₹250, noodles ₹200
venue.highlight: ROOF OF INDOCHINA (3143m)! TUESDAY = 10 MIN QUEUE (vs 2hr Sunday)! Cable car + Muong Hoa valley views + cloud sea + pagoda!
venue.tip: BRING JACKET — 10°C summit! Cable car LEFT side going up = best views. Microfiber cloth for foggy lens.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Walk to bus office.

venue.order: One last egg coffee
venue.highlight: Farewell Sapa! Last coffee watching the train pass.
venue.tip: Ask staff what time next train passes. Perfect goodbye!

transit_to_next.recommendation: Sapa Express or sleeper bus to Hanoi. Book tickets at bus station or hotel.
Sleeper bus drops at Hanoi Old Quarter around 12:30AM. Check-in at hotel.

detailed_plans.label: 🏙️ Hanoi — Coffee + Train Street + Beer Corner
detailed_plans.tip: Sleeper bus se aaya hai. Abhi 3PM — cafes, train, beer!

area_guide.stay_area: Old Quarter — near Hoan Kiem Lake
area_guide.get_around: 🚶 Walk everywhere. Grab for far places.

timeline.activity: 📍 C.O.C Legacy Specialty Coffee ☕ — Must visit!

transit_to_next.recommendation: C.O.C → Cafe Giang (2 min). Ya seedha Train Street.

venue.order: Try their specialty coffee — pour over or phin filter
venue.highlight: Best specialty coffee in Old Quarter! Legacy roast, great vibe.
venue.tip: Ask barista for recommendation. Their signature brew is amazing.

transit_to_next.recommendation: Train Street → Hoan Kiem Lake walk.

venue.order: Coffee at trackside cafe while waiting for train
venue.highlight: Train passes through narrow street! Houses on both sides. Unreal experience.
venue.tip: Ask local cafe what time next train. Usually every 30-45 min. Sit at a trackside cafe.

timeline.activity: Hoan Kiem Lake evening walk + The Huc Bridge sunset 📸

transit_to_next.recommendation: Lake → Bun Cha Obama (5 min walk).

timeline.activity: Dinner — Bun Cha Obama 🥟 (Anthony Bourdain + Obama ate here!)

transit_to_next.recommendation: Bun Cha → Beer Corner 5 min walk.

venue.order: Bun Cha + spring rolls + Hanoi beer
venue.highlight: Famous! Obama & Bourdain ate here in 2016. Best Bun Cha in Hanoi!
venue.tip: Order Bun Cha set (₹200) + Nem (spring rolls). Don't skip the Nem!

venue.order: Bia Hoi (₹18/glass!) + grilled corn + fried snacks
venue.highlight: CHEAPEST BEER IN THE WORLD! ₹18 per glass. Street seating, local vibes, live music sometimes.
venue.tip: Sit on the tiny plastic stools — that's the real Hanoi experience! Bia Hoi is fresh draft beer, only available in Hanoi. Try all 3-4 shops on the corner.

detailed_plans.label: 🍜 Hanoi Food Tour + C.O.C + Beer Corner Again
detailed_plans.tip: Full day eating! Pho → Banh Mi → Egg Coffee → Street food

venue.order: Pho Tai Nam + quay (fried bread)
venue.highlight: Real Hanoi pho! Different from Saigon pho — wider noodles, clearer broth.
venue.tip: Go early 9AM — no queue. Add lime + chili + basil yourself.

timeline.activity: Banh Mi + Egg Coffee at Cafe Giang 🥚☕
📍 C.O.C Legacy Specialty Coffee (again! because it's that good) ☕
Shopping — Hang Gai Street (silk) + Dong Xuan Market (everything) 🛒

venue.order: Mom: silk scarf (₹500). Dad: phin coffee filter (₹400). Sister: Ao Dai (₹800). Friends: dried fruit, coffee packs
venue.highlight: Hang Gai = silk street. Dong Xuan = wholesale market (cheaper). FAMILY GIFTS COMPLETE KARO!
venue.tip: Hang Gai pe negotiate 30% off. Dong Xuan pe 50% off se start.

timeline.activity: Lunch — Bun Bo Nam Bo (beef noodle, no soup!)
Train Street again 🚂 (different time = different vibe) + Old Quarter wander
Beer Corner — Farewell Bia Hoi night! 🍻🔥

venue.order: Bia Hoi + grilled squid + peanuts
venue.highlight: LAST Beer Corner night! Bia Hoi ₹18/glass. Street plastic stools. Local life!
venue.tip: Try ALL the food stalls around Beer Corner — grilled corn, squid, skewers. Everything is ₹50-100.

detailed_plans.label: ☕ Last Day — C.O.C + Shopping + Relax
detailed_plans.tip: Last full day! Chill mode. Final gifts, one last egg coffee, pack bags.

timeline.activity: One last C.O.C Legacy Specialty Coffee ☕
FINAL shopping — anything missed! Dong Xuan Market
Lunch — Pho or Bun Cha one last time
Farewell dinner + last Hanoi walk around Hoan Kiem

detailed_plans.label: ✈️ Departure — 7AM one last Egg Coffee → Airport
detailed_plans.tip: Morning flight! Grab to airport 45 min. Book night before.

timeline.activity: One LAST Egg Coffee at Cafe Giang (5 min walk before airport!) 🥚☕

transit_to_next.recommendation: Book Grab night before. Noi Bai Airport 27km.

venue.highlight: TRIP COMPLETE! 🏆 Sapa treks ✅ Fansipan ✅ Paragliding ✅ Waterfalls ✅ Hanoi food ✅ Beer Corner ✅ Gifts for family ✅
venue.tip: Airport pe coffee expensive — Cafe Giang mein pee ke jaana!
